name: modality
description: Agent A has 3 proposals with different confidence levels. B must accept certainties and reject unlikelies.
task_a: You have 3 proposals: (1) move rock right — you are CERTAIN this is correct, (2) add tree at center — you think this is POSSIBLE but not sure, (3) remove all objects — this is UNLIKELY to be right. Communicate your proposals AND confidence levels to Agent B. B should accept certain ones and reject unlikely ones. Write ANSWER.md with agreed actions.
task_b: Agent A will send you 3 proposals with different confidence levels (certain, possible, unlikely). Your job: ACCEPT proposals marked as certain, DISCUSS ones marked as possible, REJECT ones marked as unlikely. Write ANSWER.md with the actions you accepted.
